_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_37_note: Session 37 (2026-05-31, Sunday): NVDA final pre-keynote sweep (June 1 GTC Taipei keynote TODAY — hasn't occurred yet). Key findings: (1) NVIDIA $6.5B photonics investment (CNBC May 29): $2B each Lumentum, Coherent, Marvell; $500M Corning; $500M Ayar Labs — strategic move into optical interconnect layer inside AI factories; (2) N1X final Geekbench leak: 20 ARM cores 2.81GHz+, RTX 5070 Ti-class iGPU, TSMC N3P, 128GB LPDDR5x-8533; (3) MRVL: Polariton Technologies acquisition (optical photonics) + Alphabet custom chip talks + Benchmark $275, JPMorgan $240, Oppenheimer $250 analyst upgrades; (4) ANET: implied -4.3% May 30 drop (est. $148.60 from $155.27) — >3% trigger, Cisco +32% vs ANET -10% in May, NVIDIA photonics competitive signal — added to event_queue; (5) MU price corrected: May 29 close $971 (not $923.52 carry); May 30 est. $964.75; RSI overbought (CNBC); (6) TSM: CEO C.C. Wei raised FY2026 guide to 'above 30% USD' + pledged >30% employee bonus increase; (7) TrendForce Q2 2026 DRAM +58-63% conventional, +93-98% mobile — structural undersupply through late 2027. Phase 1b/1c gated (37%6=1). No DCF. Session 38 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: capture June 1 NVDA GTC Taipei keynote in full.

event_queue.event: Computex GTC Taipei June 1 keynote 11am Taipei (10am Manila) — keynote occurs TODAY (Session 37 ran before keynote). SESSION 38 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: capture full keynote — N1X official specs + OEM partners + pricing, Vera Rubin NVL72 production volume official numbers, Dynamo 1.0 GA, 'surprise new product' reveal (Jensen teased one explicitly). Pre-keynote context: $6.5B photonics investment confirmed CNBC May 29; N1X Geekbench: 20 cores 2.81GHz+ RTX 5070 Ti iGPU.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang (10:30am Taipei, Nangang Exhibition Center) — 'The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity.' NVLink Fusion showcase. Session 38/39: capture keynote outcome, update MRVL entity. New context: Polariton acquisition + Alphabet custom chip talks. Watch for Google TPU/Amazon Trainium volume numbers.

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei, TaiNEX 1 Room 303). Price est. $341.02 close May 30. Session 38/39: capture demo outcome and any hyperscaler design win announcements beyond Amazon Trainium3.

Price move >3%: implied -4.3% on May 30 (est. close ~$148.60 from confirmed $155.27 May 29). Cisco +32% vs ANET -10% in May (24/7 Wall St) — institutional rotation underway. NVIDIA $6.5B photonics investment adds competitive vector on optical networking. Verify May 30 close at next session; if confirmed, assess whether Cisco outperformance is a sustained rotation or temporary. May 5 Q1 supply chain warning (margins through 2026) still unresolved.

Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued for post-earnings session. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -54.1% (corrected from -52.1%; May 29 close was $971, not $923.52 carry). RSI overbought (CNBC May 30); $1,000 psychological resistance. No deep session before June 24.
